name: Yuki Machida
description: Yuki Machida is the manager of the Ryuhoku High basketball team. She has always been mature ever since she was a little kid and also has a crush on the captain of the team, Kido. Yuki thinks of him as her "first love". He was the reason why Yuki joined as the manager of the basketball club in the first place. Her interest on him later faded away when she found out that Kido was going out with someone else which also results her to gradually develop feelings for Shou. Yuki is a serious and stern

name: Yuki Rurikawa
description: He participates in the Summer Troupe as a costume specialist and actor. He may look feminine, but that is only because he wears any cute clothes he likes. On the inside, he is fully male. However, his personality is rather frank and brazen, and he often goes off at his seniors. The gap between his personality and his looks are steep. After he did the costumes for the Spring Troupe's play, Izumi decided to invite him to the summer audition. Soon following, Yuki became a part of the Mankai Company

name: Yuma Tsukumo
description: Yuma Tsukumo is the main character of Zexal. Yuma lives with his older sister and grandmother, because he lost his parents, who were archaeologists. A necklace that his parents gave him seems to hold many secrets. His dad also left him with his deck. Despite the lack of parents, Yuma is usually a happy and energetic child, who hates unfairness and cares about his friends. He never gives up and always shoots for the top. Unfortunately, he doesn't always make it. His goal is to become the world ch

name: Aiichirou Nitori
description: A member of the swim team at Samezuka Academy. He is a first year and Rin's roommate.

name: Excalibur
description: She’s an ego sword made by Arthur given to Heo Seol-Jin. When in Ego Weapon form, Excalibur's appears like a huge sword with a broad, blue shining blade and a black handle and a golden ring that connects both the handle and the blade.

name: Fine
description: The begrudging queen of the vampires whom Momo runs away with. She often wishes to die due to losing the human love of her life, Aria, to the war. After meeting Momo, whom bears a resemblance to Aria, she begins to foster her growing love for music and leaves the war behind as she learns to live again.

name: Itsuki Hashima
description: __Occupation:__ Novelist Itsuki is the protagonist of the series who has an obsession towards younger sisters. He is a novelist who debuted when he was in high school; all of his novels feature younger sisters as the heroine. In the span of five years, he has published 20 books, some of which have ranked in the top 10 weekly rankings for light novels on Oricon. Despite his success, his irrational personality and writing style has led to mediocre success compared to his fellow writers. ~!He admit

name: Kana Minami
description: Height: 163 cm Kana is the middle sister of the Minami household and is in her second year of junior-high school. She is fairly ill-mannered and lazy compared to her sisters, preferring to spend her spare time lounging around the house and doing as little work as possible. However, depending on her overall mood and boredom levels, she is unarguably the most hyperactive of the bunch. She can be quite selfish at times, and will frequently play pranks on or tease her younger sister, Chiaki. She has

name: Kensuke Ooshiba
description: Ken is Asaya's boyfriend. they were at first childhood friends. but Asaya had to move, due to his parents. after Asaya came back years later. turns out Asaya's been in love with Ken ever since they were children.

name: Mitsuyoshi Misawa
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6') Mitsuyoshi is a tall, tan skinned young man with dark brown combed back hair. His attire often consists of casual clothes, his ever-present sunglasses, piercings, a silver necklace, two rings on each hand, a cigarette, and the occasional wrist band. Also, according to the manga, Mitsuyoshi's eyes strongly resemble Haru and Yuuzan's father's eyes, which is why he wears sunglasses constantly; so the two siblings do not hate him.

name: Momoko Hyakushiki
description: __Height:__ 181 cm The prison warden who has a crush on Hajime Sugoroku.

name: Oscar Vessalius
nativeName: オスカー・ベザリウス
description: Oz's uncle. He is easy-going and very caring. Oscar was the one who found Gilbert and brought him to the Vessalius household. Both Oz and Raven treat him as a father figure. He gets along well with Break. ~!When he received a letter from Ada (in which she stated that she had found someone who she likes), he took Oz, Gilbert and Alice to Latowidge. They dressed as students, and snuck into the school.!~

name: Percival
description: Percival is the son of Ironside and grandson of Balgis, and is the main protagonist of the sequel, Four Knights of the Apocalypse.

name: Pompompurin
description: This boy golden retriever is unmistakable in his trademark brown beret. He has a laidback demeanor and loves the phrase 'let's go out!' He loves milk, anything soft, and his mama's cream caramel puddings. He has a talent for napping and doing 'purin aerobics', and can make friends with anyone. His dream is to get even bigger. (Source: Sanrio)

name: Pram Schneider
description: __Circle Tier Level:__ 3 (Swordmage) Pram is a member of Desir Arman's alpha party made of commoners. ~! Pram’s weapon of choice was a rapier made of Blankšum, left by his noble father (The super light rapier). The sword was originally in a rusted hilt and was sold to a pawn shop for little money. Later on, Desir Arman and Pram go back to take the sword back, and after a disagreement, Desir is forced to fight the merchant's bodyguard and take the sword back to its rightful owner !~

name: Ringo Noyamano
description: Team- Sleeping Forest Status- Thorn Queen Road- Sonia Road Ringo looks like your everyday junior high school girl. However, she is actually the successor of the legendary Storm Riders team, Sleeping Forest . She is also the current Thorn King (Queen) of the eight 'Kings' in the AT world. Ringo is in love with Ikki but does not dare to tell him. She helps Kogarasumaru in times of trouble under the guise of Croissant Mask (Croissiant Kamen). Ringo is a King Class AT user. name: Ryuuko Tatsuma
description: When she activates her Quirk, her body transforms into that of a large, winged dragon with pale gray scales, although she still has the same skin tone, hair and eyes, and her hero costume remains visible bar her boots.

name: Saltherine Aldarake
nativeName: サルトリーヌ・アルダレイク
description: Saltherine Aldarake, or Sally, is a bright, cheerful princess who wants to go on an adventure because she is bored of her tiny little castle in the countryside. Sally has a kind-hearted spirit who craves for adventure. She is always protective of her friends and longs to fulfill her goal of having humans and Oni live together in peace. When she activates her Peach eyes she takes on a form almost identical to the one Mikoto takes while fighting Oni.
searchTerms: サルトリーヌ・アルダレイク

name: Sanyueqi
description: A spirited and quirky young girl who is into all the things girls her age are interested in, such as taking photos. She was awakened from a piece of drifting eternal ice, only to find that she knows nothing about herself or her past. Though initially feeling dejected, she decided to name herself after the date of her rebirth.

name: Satoshi Mashiba
description: A boy who becomes interested in and joins Ishida's group of friends upon learning they are making a movie. He is eager to be the leading actor and is considered handsome and talented enough to do so. Mashiba was lonely as a child and the other children took him for granted and bullied him, now he is completely intolerant of bullies in any form, and while generally calm and level-headed, he reacts violently to any random act of bullying he sees. ~!He is oblivious to Kawai's crush on him until Ish

name: Seth
description: The god of war and deserts, who wields control over sand and protects Egypt from foreign enemies. Centuries ago, he murdered his king and brother, Osiris, before usurping the throne. Violent and destructive, Seth has ruled Egypt for hundreds of years unchallenged until his encounter with Horus, the son of Osiris and his nephew. Faced with the prospect of losing his throne, Seth and Horus must battle each other for the title of ruler of Egypt. Manga: Ennead

name: Shinzo Yozakura
description: __Affiliation:__ Yozakura Family __Occupation:__ Spy (Gold Rank) ~!__Blooming:__ Destroy!~ The constantly jittery third child of the family, specialized in firearms. He often hides in a trash can. Shinzo is a scaredy-cat, and he also has a rather low self-esteem despite his strength when serious. Shinzo always has one of his guns on him, even when he was a child. Without his weapons of choice, Shinzo seems useless and cowards in fear and distress. He gives off a different, more serious vibe as i

name: Shouichi Imayoshi
description: __Height:__ 180 cm __School:__ Touo Academy __Number:__ #4 __Position:__ Point Guard __Talent:__ Intelligence, Mind Games Touou High's captain and Point Guard, he is a well-spoken and superficially kind on first glance, but hides a somewhat darker personality that more subtly reveals itself in conversation. name: Toshinari Seki
description: Toshinari Seki, referred by his surname Seki, is one of the main characters. He is always seen playing games at his desk, from intermediate to near impossible, though he never seems to study. Seki has short black hair, green eyes, and is somewhat enigmatic. Throughout the show he is seen rarely speaking.
